subject: Reinstall fipindicateur and re-arm autostart entry
learnings: make install never touches autostart: the app writes it via SetAutostart. When editing the entry by hand, match the app's output byte-for-byte so they never fight.

subject: Set up gnome-shell watchdog that auto-kills fipindicateur
learnings: A D-Bus property read on org.gnome.Shell dispatches on the shell's main loop, so it times out exactly when the session is wedged, even at low CPU. Also: a kill-by-name watchdog cannot be live-fire tested while the real app is running; test detection with no-kill thresholds instead.

subject: Per-station colors for stats report bars
learnings: radiofrance.fr publishes official per-webradio colors as CSS tokens (--webradio-fix-fip-*), first-party and unconditional. Brand palettes are not chart palettes: clamp per theme to 3:1 contrast (mix toward black/white), and let direct labels carry identity (Hip-Hop and Metal officially share one purple).

subject: Tray icon tinted with active station color (10s gradient)
learnings: The tray icon was already an animated VU meter, so tinting rides existing frames with zero new SetIcon sites. Quantize any transition (16 steps) so the frame cache stays bounded and a zap costs a bounded number of icon updates: the 2026-07-09 freeze was unbounded churn, not animation per se.

subject: Crossfade entre stations (3-5s) au zap
learnings: mpv has no native crossfade; the trick is two libmpv handles with role swap, ramping mpv's INTERNAL volume only. Never ramp ao-volume: PulseAudio stream-restore would persist the fade level as the user's app volume. Same-station fades (quality toggle) phase/echo because two icecast connections never share a live edge: stop first.

subject: Windows 80/20: build tags + cross-compile .exe
learnings: The macOS _other.go build-tag discipline made GOOS=windows nearly free (only open/relaunch missing). The real 20%: cgo needs a windows-tagged file to carry explicit CFLAGS/LDFLAGS because a shared '#cgo pkg-config:' line applies to every platform; and fyne/systray wants ICO on Windows, satisfied by a 22-byte PNG-in-ICO wrapper (Vista+) at the single SetIcon chokepoint.

subject: Reglage crossfade au menu + slider volume zenity
learnings: SNI tray menus cannot host sliders; zenity --scale --print-partial gives a real live-drag slider with zero Go deps (stdlib exec, LookPath-gated). Apply per tick but record telemetry once on OK; set cfg before SetVolume so the ao-volume observer echo is swallowed by the equal-value guard.

subject: Taste signals: explicit like/dislike (events + prefs.jsonl + tray UI)
learnings: a.on records the behaviour event BEFORE the handler runs, so state-gated items must stay Disabled until valid or you log ghost events with no prefs entry.

subject: tools/enrich companion: Wikidata + embeddings + 2D projection
learnings: model2vec static multilingual embeddings + sklearn t-SNE handle a ~280-point artist map with no torch; caching every raw API response made the rerun cost 3 requests instead of 473.

subject: Design direction + DESIGN.md (Fin d emission)
learnings: Editorial-typographic is itself a saturated AI lane; singularity came from a physical scene (tuner glow at 2am) plus ONE committed color (FIP rose) and a named kicker system (the conducteur) that earns its numbering.

subject: SPA build-time toolchain (esbuild + D3 + subsetted WOFF2)
learnings: Commit the generated .tmpl so go build stays node-free, and make the bundler assert its own invariants (__FIP_DATA__ count, em-dash ban) so drift fails at build not at lint.

subject: Extended stats derivation (epochs, enriched, tastes)
learnings: Parallel worktree agents branched pre-merge recreate shared packages (internal/prefs was born twice); state the exact base commit in briefs or sequence the merges.

subject: Fin d emission report page (9 segments, 4 new dataviz)
learnings: SVG marker arrowheads scale with stroke-width and markerUnits=userSpaceOnUse is unreliable in chromium; draw fixed-size heads from the curve end tangent instead.

subject: Final integration: merges, e2e verify on real data, CHANGELOG
learnings: Whole-tree lint greps break on untracked toolchain dirs (node_modules, .venv) left by worktree agents; exclude them in the gate itself and mirror the exclusion in CI.
